creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a problem with versions of BSD tar that preserve permissions.  However, 
it is not unique to FreeBSD.  Even if we were to chmod the directory 
post-extract, we would still be vulnerable to a small window where files could 
be replaced.  Since the issues is with the permissions in the dist tarball, 
this needs to be raised with the libiconv authors.
